title: refactor(packages-ui): drop DesignShowcase from published library + dead theme/prop cleanup
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Exclude the 1212-line DesignShowcase demo from the published @pollinations/ui tarball via a `files` negation (`!dist/showcase`); it still builds to dist for the local apps/react dev demo (export + tsup entry retained, App.tsx untouched).
- Remove dead `themeColors` export (zero consumers) from theme.ts + index.ts; delete its now-empty theme.test.ts; de-reference it in tools/icons/src/cli.js comment.
- ScrollArea: narrow `ScrollAxis` to "y"|"x" (drop unused "both"), remove the never-overridden `hideDelayMs` prop and hardcode the 2000ms idle timeout.
- AuthModal: drop the unused `titleId` prop from AuthInfoCard.

Risks:
- `@pollinations/ui/showcase` subpath export is retained but its files no longer ship; external npm consumers importing it would 404. Never a supported public API (demo only); the sole consumer (apps/react) resolves it from the locally built dist.
- Removing the `themeColors` named export is SemVer-relevant for external npm consumers, but it had zero in-repo callers and only ever listed 2 of 6 themes.
- Verified the tarball exclusion with `npm pack --dry-run` (0 dist/showcase entries, all other entries present); packages/ui vitest (14 pass) and `tsc --noEmit` are clean. apps/react build/typecheck could not run in this environment (workspace `@pollinations/*` symlinks absent), so the dev demo was validated by reasoning: import path, export map, and tsup entry are all unchanged.

Deferred (out of scope / premise changed):
- Finding 1 — exact prescribed mechanism (remove ./showcase export + tsup entry, deep-import — Implemented the finding's GOAL (demo absent from npm bundle) but via a safer mechanism than the two prescribed options. 

_~45 net lines removed · biome ✓ · cd packages/ui && npx vitest run (7 files, 14 tests, all pass); npx tsc --noEmit (clean, e ✓_

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the UI package
gist.blurb: We've swept out some dead code and removed the massive DesignShowcase from the published UI package. Lighter downloads and cleaner code for everyone!
gist.summary: Excluded the 1212-line DesignShowcase demo from the published @pollinations/ui npm tarball and removed unused exports like themeColors and dead props in ScrollArea.
gist.impact: The @pollinations/ui package is now significantly lighter for consumers, and the internal codebase is cleaner with fewer dead code paths.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee sweeping or cleaning up a digital garden or a UI component library. A tiny broom, sweeping away dead pixel leaves (representing dead code).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny scarf and holding a small broom, sweeping away dead pixelated leaves and old code blocks from a lime green (#ecf874) garden path. A chunky retro monitor in the background shows a clean, organized UI. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
